title: verbesina auriculigera var. cajamarcensis
intro: Verbesina auriculigera var. cajamarcensis is a plant species that is a variety of the Verbesina auriculigera plant, which is commonly known as the ear dropseed. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Verbesina auriculigera var. cajamarcensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a valuable treatment for conditions such as arthritis and respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine in its native regions.
